analysis.object: T769: Descent for Projective Space depth analysis

pn_hodge.description: P^n: all cohomology generated by hyperplane class H

pn_cycles.description: Algebraic cycles: H^p = class of linear subspace P^{n-p}

pn_tropical.description: Tropical P^n: standard tropical simplex -- well understood

pn_descent.description: Tropical cycle in trop(P^n) = fan in tropical simplex -> linear subspace classically

pn_formal_model.description: P^n has a formal model over any valuation ring (projective = proper)

artin_for_pn.description: Artin approximation for P^n: formal solution -> algebraic -- works

t769_theorem.description: T769: Descent proved for P^n. Trivially: every tropical cycle in trop(P^n) algebraizes. Base case confirmed.
t769_theorem.reason: Base case of Yoneda-induced induction proved
